title: Aio's Legendary Spawning Datapack
description: A datapack that adds some legendary spawning to cobblemon!
body:
Adds 20 new spawns to cobblemon that include pokemon like the legendary bird trio from kanto to zarude from pokemon sword and shields!

To check the pokespawns you can go to this google sheets link [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1O6hFJvCTECDoRZ0wd0Dz1vXYWfj7jKs2mofIoHkQg8o/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1O6hFJvCTECDoRZ0wd0Dz1vXYWfj7jKs2mofIoHkQg8o/edit?usp=sharing)

### **THIS IS ONLY A DATAPACK NOT A RESOURCE PACK!!!!!!**
